title: Secured-AVD marketplace image alias map
description: Canonical alias-to-imageReference map. The 'alias' key (e.g. 'win11-24h2-avd-m365') is what users pass via the imageReference variable. Image SKUs are pinned to 'latest' for floor-version freshness; pin to a specific version in production via the version key.

win11-24h2-avd-m365.displayName: Windows 11 Enterprise multi-session, version 24H2 + Microsoft 365 Apps
win11-24h2-avd-m365.recommendedFor: Pooled host pools with Office 365 ProPlus users (most common AVD profile)

win11-24h2-avd.recommendedFor: Pooled host pools without bundled M365 (BYO Office or no Office)

win11-23h2-avd-m365.displayName: Windows 11 Enterprise multi-session, version 23H2 + Microsoft 365 Apps
win11-23h2-avd-m365.recommendedFor: Fleets pinned to 23H2 until 24H2 burn-in complete

win10-22h2-avd-m365.recommendedFor: Legacy Windows 10 fleets (Win10 EOL Oct 2025 — plan migration)
